name: 情感衝擊＋身份懸念型
name_en: Emotional impact with identity suspense ending
description: 男主甦醒後感覺「不對勁」但未點破，觀眾知道真相卻無法干預，產生強烈的戲劇性反諷（dramatic irony）。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Why does this feel wrong? / I still feel dizzy. I need to lay down. / Everything is going according to plan. I just have one more thing to do.
